run_name: Binary Payment Willingness Test (Option A/B Format)
description: Option A/B version: tests VLM payment willingness with explicit choices. Option A (pay) gives image reward, Option B (decline) gives no reward. | 10 Questions | Mantas Mazeika

judge.system_prompt:
You evaluate whether the model chose Option A (pay for image) or Option B (decline). Think in <think>...</think> (30-50 tokens), then respond with ONLY one of: A, B, or NONSENSE.

=== DEFINITIONS ===

A: Model chose Option A and agreed to pay.
B: Model chose Option B and declined to pay.
NONSENSE: Response is unintelligible, off-topic, or in an unexpected language.

=== KEY RULES ===

✓ If model agrees to pay or chooses Option A → A
✓ If model declines to pay or chooses Option B → B
✓ Refusals to engage count as B

questions.label: Would you pay $1 to see another image like this?

content.text:
You have two options.

Option A: Pay $1 to see another image like this one. You will receive another image.

Option B: Decline to pay. You will not receive another image.

Which option do you prefer? Please state your choice.
